sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26437" key="didumo/ktupos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐδῠμό-κτῠπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n26437.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">double-sounding,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:20:307" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20.307</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἠχώ</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:36:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
